title: AI Toolbox Doctor JSON Output
description: Schema for the JSON shape emitted by `ai-toolbox doctor --json`. Used by CI integrations and external dashboards.

version.description: Output schema version. Bump when the structure changes so consumers can pin compatibility.

toolbox_version.description: Version of the toolbox that produced this output, copied from .ai-toolbox/config.json toolbox_version.

status.description: Aggregate status: ok = all checks green; warning = no errors but at least one warning; error = at least one critical failure.

summary.description: Counts of check results by status. Sums must equal checks.length.

checks.description: Individual check results in execution order.

errors.description: Top-level errors emitted by the doctor itself (e.g. failed to read config). Distinct from per-check errors.

name.description: Stable identifier for the check. Used by external tools — do not rename casually.

category.description: Logical group this check belongs to (structure, hooks, memory, tooling, gitignore, parity, audit, plugins).

fix.description: Concrete shell command or instruction to remediate. Populated on warning/error status when --explain is set or by default.

error_code.description: Reference to .agent/contracts/error-codes.json key, if the check failed with a known structured error.
